items.name: Astra's Stellar Blade
items.description: Forged from the heart of a dying star, Astra's Stellar Blade gleams with a celestial light that shifts in hues of midnight blue and radiant silver. Its blade, tempered with stardust and meteoric iron, is as sharp as the edge of the cosmos itself. The hilt is wrapped in a grip of dark leather, adorned with intricate constellations, and crowned with a luminous gem that pulses like a distant galaxy.

items.name: To Buy Use This code:- Black sword
items.description: Unleash the dark power of the ages with the Stealth Black Immortal Sword: Vlad’s Lament, a legendary weapon forged in the shadows of an ancient, cursed realm. Crafted with an obsidian-black blade and adorned with menacing hooks, this sword embodies the sorrowful legacy of Vlad, a fallen immortal warrior. Its sleek, stealthy design makes it perfect for silent strikes, while its unique addon features enhance your combat prowess. Wield it to dominate your enemies and carry the weight of Vlad’s eternal lament into every battle

items.name: [PBR] Immortal Wings: Frozen Interstellar Wings
items.description:
Forged in the endless silence of the cosmos, the Frozen Interstellar Wings shimmer with the pure essence of starlit frost. Their crystalline feathers glisten like shards of ice, each one infused with the breath of frozen nebulae and the whispers of ancient galaxies. When spread, they radiate an aura of calm yet unyielding power, as if time itself slows to admire their beauty.

Price: 1500/11 stock
Purchase Game: https://www.roblox.com/games/73736600148167
